title: phillyrea latifolia f. rotundifolia
intro: Phillyrea latifolia f. rotundifolia, also known as the Round-leaved Phillyrea, is a shrub or small tree that belongs to the olive family (Oleaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. Its leaves and branches have been used in traditional medicine for their antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Phillyrea latifolia f. rotundifolia include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial and fungal infections, and acting as a natural antioxidant. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
